name: HWR_ISSUE_B
description: This table stores reputation control issues.

columns.Name: ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for this table.

columns.Name: GBL_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This is global profile id of the user

columns.Name: ORG_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the identifier of the business unit associated to the row.

columns.Name: CONTROL_KEY
columns.Comments: The key of the reputation control from the HWR_REP_CONTROL_B table.

columns.Name: RELEVANCE
columns.Comments: This is the relevance value for this post.

columns.Name: NUM_OCCURRENCES
columns.Comments: This is the number of occurrences for this result.

columns.Name: SRC_POST_ID
columns.Comments: This is the id of the post from the source.

columns.Name: MESSAGE
columns.Comments: This is the message that was posted.

columns.Name: POST_DATE
columns.Comments: The date on which the post was created.

columns.Name: PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: The id of the profile that posted this post.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Id of the source in the HWR_SRC_SOURCE_B table.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
